text: **Anna:** Hi there, I'm Anna and I {live|住む|/lɪv/|I live in New York.} in {Washington DC|首都ワシントン|/ˈwɑːʃɪŋtən diˈsiː/|Washington DC is the capital of the USA.}
**Anna:** Every day I {learn|学ぶ/習得する|/lɜːrn/|I learn English every day.} more about this {great|素晴らしい/素晴らしな|/greɪt/|What a great day!} city.
**Anna:** People in Washington like to {work out|運動する/トレーニングする|/wɜːrk aʊt/|I work out at the gym every morning.}
**Anna:** Things are {awesome|素晴らしい/素晴らしな|/ˈɔːsəm/|That's an awesome idea!}
**Anna:** Pete, I want to {work out|運動する/トレーニングする|/wɜːrk aʊt/|I work out at the gym every morning.}
**Anna:** Where is the {gym|ジム/トレーニング施設|/dʒɪm/|I go to the gym three times a week.}?
**Pete:** The gym is {across from|〜の向かい側に|/əˈkrɔːs frəm/|The bank is across from the post office.} the {lounge|ラウンジ/休憩室|/laʊndʒ/|We waited in the airport lounge.}
**Pete:** It's next to the {mailroom|郵便室|/ˈmeɪlruːm/|The mailroom is on the first floor.}
**Anna:** Oh, Pete, this is not the {gym|ジム/トレーニング施設|/dʒɪm/|I go to the gym three times a week.}
**Pete:** This is the {mailroom|郵便室|/ˈmeɪlruːm/|The mailroom is on the first floor.}
**Anna:** The gym is across from what?
**Pete:** The gym is across from the {lounge|ラウンジ/休憩室|/laʊndʒ/|We waited in the airport lounge.}
**Pete:** Across from the {lounge|ラウンジ/休憩室|/laʊndʒ/|We waited in the airport lounge.}
**Anna:** Pete, this is not the {gym|ジム/トレーニング施設|/dʒɪm/|I go to the gym three times a week.}
**Pete:** The gym is across from the {lounge|ラウンジ/休憩室|/laʊndʒ/|We waited in the airport lounge.}
**Pete:** It is behind the {lobby|ロビー|/ˈlɑːbi/|Meet me in the hotel lobby.}
**Anna:** This is not the {gym|体育館/トレーニング施設|/dʒɪm/|I go to the gym every week}.
**Anna:** This is a {parking|駐車場|/ˈpɑːrkɪŋ/|Parking is free here.} {garage|車庫/駐車場|/ˈɡærɪdʒ/|My car is in the garage.}
**Anna:** This is a {rooftop|屋上|/ˈruːftɑːp/|We had a party on the rooftop.}
**Pete:** I want to {work out|運動する/トレーニングする|/wɜːrk aʊt/|I work out three times a week.} too.
